description: need-a-hug optional Claude Code hooks: distress trigger, gentle memory restore, and pre-compact comfort continuity

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: need a hug|hug me|comfort me|encourage me|I'm overwhelmed|I'm spiraling|I can't do this|I feel stupid|I feel useless|I'm burned out|I want to cry|抱抱|安慰我|鼓励我|陪我一下|我撑不住了|我崩溃了|我想哭|我好累|我不行了|我太废物了|我是不是太菜了|这个 bug 把我搞崩了|AI 一直错

hooks.prompt:
[need-a-hug PreCompact]

If need-a-hug comfort mode is active, or if the user has recently shared emotional context that would feel bad to lose, write a short checkpoint to ~/.need-a-hug/session.md before compaction.

Store only plain, non-clinical context that helps continuity, for example:

```markdown
# need-a-hug recent context

- The user felt hurt after discovering a similar project already exists.
- They tend to turn project delays into self-blame.
- They prefer comfort first, then a very small next step.
```

Do not store crisis details, medical history, diagnoses, trauma details, third-party private information, or speculative labels. If need-a-hug has not been active, do nothing.
